title: ブラックボックスから聴こえる

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
All right, Air Shakur, do a lap for me using the strategy I just
explained.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, I've once again come to the training course to watch
the racers. That's when I spot a trainer talking to Air Shakur.
choice_data_list: (I wonder what sort of run she'll show him...)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Sigh. Let's do this.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hrrraugh!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Eek! N-no way... Let's run somewhere else...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur's run is wilder than I imagined... but it's not sloppy. In fact,
I'd say it's refined to the point where no inefficiency remains.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff! Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she enters the straightaway, she goes faster and faster, like she's
chasing her prey. I'm awestruck by the skill on display. She's clearly
talented. However...

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text: H-hey! What do you think you're doing? That is not what I told you to do!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I told you to try pace chasing for this first lap, so why did you hold
back until the fourth corner?

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
If I'm going to be your trainer, I need to assess your skills. But I can't
do that unless you cooperate!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Then don't waste my time.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You need to see me pace chase to assess my abilities? Why? What's
the logic there?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Not that it matters. I've already collected and assessed the data
myself. I'm not gonna waste resources on half-baked experiments.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
But you can't guarantee that the data you've collected is correct,
right? My experience as a trainer affords me the insight to make—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, okay, we're done. You're the same as all the others, so forget I
ever agreed to this training supervision thing. Leave.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What are you saying?! We just got started!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: And now we're done. If you try and take up any more of my precious time... You know what'll happen, right? Right?!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text: Urk! Wh-what's your problem... Fine, have it your way!

text_block_list.name: Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
D-did you see that? How the heck are you supposed to train such an unruly
racer?

text_block_list.name: Trainer B
text_block_list.text: You don't, that's how... Talking to her would be like talking to a brick wa—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hey, if you're gonna whisper, at least do it where I can't—

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hwaaah!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Owww... I'm so sorry... Look at me, making you help me up again...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Another spectacular fall. What happened this time?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ah, um, well... I guess I went a little overboard... My time hasn't
gotten any shorter recently... I suppose I was running too much...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...So you've hit a wall. Instead of tackling it head-on, wouldn't it be
better to try something else?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I get that you're working hard, but you can only improve so much. We
all have limits. Refusing to give up will just result in wasted time.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Um, well... I'm not very clever, so any idea I have would be
worthless... All I can do is work hard.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But I figured that as long as I keep throwing my whole body into that
wall... maybe someday, it'll finally break? I don't know...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...I see. Well, then I guess... I look forward to seeing you tear down
that wall.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: "Someday," huh...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What a meaningless wish...

text_block_list.name: Trainer B
text_block_list.text: Phew... Looks like she's calmed down... That Air Shakur, she was even worse than usual today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She said it rather quietly, but the pain in her voice echoes through my
mind...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But so does the image of her run. Later in the evening, I find myself
back at the course, only to see...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Dammit... nothing changed! Not now, not then, NOT EVER!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Seven centimeters! That's it! Just a few centimeters, but no matter
how much I try... I can't even—

Oh my, this isn't like her at all. All that bottled up frustration is finally
spilling out.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Good evening. I am Agnes Tachyon, a friend of Shakur's... Although
I'm sure she'd object to that statement.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
She's certainly overdoing it today. For someone so obsessed with
efficiency and benefit, seeing her lashing out so fruitlessly is quite
strange.
choice_data_list: Just what is she trying to do?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Do you have much experience with the world of zeros and ones? If
not, I'm afraid you may never understand her.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You could say... Shakur is a devout follower of data. She spends her
time collecting it and running simulations, all in the hopes of finding a
solution.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
She sees the world in terms of true and false. Ambiguities such as
potential do not exist for her.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What you see now... is her god denying her a prosperous future. And
as her god is absolute, that revelation too remains unchangeable.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If it did change, that would mean her entire worldview is wrong—an
equally terrifying prospect. So she has no choice but to accept her
fate, whether she likes it or not.
choice_data_list: But even so, she wants to change something...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh, correct you are! Her mind truly is an enigma. Why does she
continue to struggle when she herself would admit it's futile?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Shakur's vision of the ideal racer is chiseled perfection... But if you
ask me, there is potential to be found in the discarded scraps and
undefined spaces.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, it looks like she's finishing up. As much as she likes observing
other runners, she hates to be the one observed.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I shall be taking my leave here, but you... Now that your curiosity has been piqued and Shakur fills your thoughts... What will you do?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if in response to Agnes Tachyon's question, I turn around and race
after Air Shakur.
